geography.data_source: KMC ward map 2022, South Kolkata affluent zone boundary, KMDA master plan

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Kolkata district tables (South zone wards), highest literacy ward cluster, stable population growth at 0.5% CAGR

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) West Bengal urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, Ballygunge-Alipore known as Kolkata's most affluent residential zone

commute_profile.data_source: Kolkata Metro Railway ridership 2023, high car ownership in affluent South Kolkata, CTC tram data

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from high-income professional zone, low fare sensitivity, high examination concern for children (prestigious schools in this zone), Lokniti-CSDS 2024 West Bengal

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from affluent residential networking patterns, cultural institution connections, club culture in South Kolkata

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Gariahat market — one of Kolkata's busiest commercial areas, KMC market survey data
Estimated from Alipore area upscale retail and restaurant cluster
Estimated from Kalighat temple area vendor cluster, pilgrimage and local market activity

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted High Income/Professional template for South Kolkata — reduced tech_knowledge_worker to 0.28 (Kolkata's IT sector smaller than Hyderabad/Bangalore), elevated retired for old-money demographic, increased journalist for media hub character

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from KMC ward councillors, South Kolkata media concentration, prestigious school density (La Martiniere, South Point, etc.)
